evidence: standards/enterprise/modern-testing.md, ADR-0011, and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporarily uncontrolled asynchronous dependency requires a bounded await, owner, flake-risk assessment, isolation plan, expiry, and deterministic replacement plan; arbitrary timing sleeps remain prohibited as proof.
statement: Asynchronous tests MUST control time and event production where applicable, use bounded awaits, propagate cancellation, and prove deterministic completion without timing sleeps.
